jsonLd.title: CarDekho is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
CarDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarDekho:
CarDekho is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho!
